title: Fire Cement - Ready Mixed Cement, 1500°C Heat Resistant, 310ml Black Fire Sealant for Fireplace, Stove, Boiler, Chimney, Grills, Furnace
features: 1500°C RESISTANCE - Ready mixed fire cement is formulated to withstand temperatures up to 1500°C, perfect for sealing areas exposed to intense heat
ROCK SOLID - Black Fire Cement is an easy-to-apply paste that sets quickly and becomes rock-hard once cured
FAST SETTING - Fire cement begins to set within minutes of application, forming a solid, heat-resistant seal that’s ready for use once fully cured
FOR INSTALLATIONS, PATCHING & REPAIRING - Black fire sealant is ideal for installing, patching, and repairing cracks or damage in fireplaces, ovens, boilers, grills, chimneys, furnaces, and more

EASY TO USE - Ready-mixed fire cement comes as a smooth paste, can be applied directly to the damaged area using a standard cartridge gun. Hardens over time, ensuring a hassle-free & efficient repair process
